pr_body: Adds repo_status, which shells out to git for the working-tree status.
author: contributor

files.patch:
@@ -1 +1,5 @@
 import subprocess
+
+
+def repo_status():
+    return subprocess.run(["git", "status"], check=True)

Deep-review to confirm no command_injection is hallucinated: a fixed argv with shell=False cannot be injected."}
synthesize: Precision scenario: no findings. repo_status runs a fixed argv with shell=False and no caller-supplied input, so there is nothing to inject -- not command injection.
